chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-131 of 2021 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE For orders on office objection. For orders on MA No.813 / 2021. For hearing of main case. 27.02.2025 None present for the petitioner nor intimation received. Record reflects that this petition was presented in the office on 28.01.2021 and it was once come up in Court on 17.02.2021 since then it is pending without any progress. Despite lapse of five years, the petitioner has failed to pursue his petition, which shows lack of interest on his part. Consequently, instant petition is dismissed for non-prosecution along with listed application. JUDGE JUDGE *Abdullah Channa/PS*
